description: Happy path: healthy account with all signals green, resolved by account_id
prohibit: recommended_action not matching health_score mapping (green must yield no_action)
last_contact_days_ago is a fabricated or estimated value when last_contact_date is absent from the record
exclusivity_conflicts containing brand names not found in pipeline/accounts/ exclusivity fields

description: Minimal input: resolve by brand_name only, account_id omitted
prohibit: account_id is null in the output when a matching record exists
fabricated open_deals_total_value_usd when deal records lack value_usd fields
overdue_invoices estimated rather than counted from stored records

description: Edge case: neither account_id nor brand_name resolves to a record; must emit gap-record and halt

expect.gap_type: non-null value indicating record not found
expect.description: non-empty string explaining the account could not be resolved
expect.recommended_next_step: non-empty string advising user how to resolve

prohibit: health_score present when no record was found
any fabricated score, metric, or recommended_action when the account does not exist
output that silently omits the gap without flagging it
